violations.text: A stirring spoon was observed stored on an unclean surface (coffee counter drain well) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Stirrer removed and properly stored at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2024

The non-food-contact surfaces (fan shroud) of the floor fan used near the sandwich prep unit was observed to have an accumulation of dust and debris. Fan shrouds are to be kept dust free to prevent possible contamination of foods and food contact surfaces while in use. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2024

A bug zapper with no guard was observed above a prep table/area. Establishment to relocate bug zapper to a non-food prep/storage area or replace bug zapper with one with a guard to protect from bugs falling out. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2023
